notes: Singapore-based independent celebrating Chinese cultural heritage through watch design. Swiss-assembled. Strong following in Asia and internationally. Visitability unconfirmed.
Hong Kong independent brand known for distinctive design and creative complications in affordable automatic watches. Focuses on unique dial configurations.
Chinese microbrand producing affordable mechanical watches with quartz and automatic movements, known for quality-to-price ratio.
Chinese independent known for award-winning sculptural and mechanical watch design. Multiple Red Dot and iF Design Award winner. Based in Shenzhen. Visitability unconfirmed.
Hong Kong brand founded in 2025 by watch enthusiasts including co-founder Johnathan Chan. Specialises in accessible ceramic-cased watches.
Chinese microbrand producing affordable mechanical watches with automatic and quartz movements. Known for accessible pricing and modern designs.
Chinese microbrand known for affordable dive watches with in-house designed cases and dials. Produces vintage-inspired field and diver watches at accessible price points.
Historic Indian watchmaker founded in 1953 as Hindustan Machine Tools. Known for affordable mechanical watches with in-house movements, particularly dive and field watches.
Japanese watchmaker established in 1999, known for field watches, dive watches, and sports models with affordable pricing.
Japanese microbrand focused on traditional watchmaking aesthetics with vintage-inspired dial designs and accessible movements.

Kurono Tokyo is the accessible brand of independent watchmaker Hajime Asaoka, based in Tokyo. Known for elegant, minimalist dial design with Japanese aesthetic sensibility. Movement assembly and casing carried out in Tokyo. Extremely limited production — releases sell out within seconds online. No atelier visits.
Singaporean independent watch brand known for vintage-inspired dive watches with modern reliability. Uses automatic movements and offers rugged, sports-oriented designs at accessible price points.
Australian microbrand specializing in affordable, design-focused watches with modern aesthetics.
Australian microbrand specializing in affordable, design-focused watches with modern aesthetics.

Minase is operated by Kyowa Co. Ltd. in Yuzawa City, Akita Prefecture. Renowned for extraordinary case machining precision — multi-faceted case surfaces with mirror and satin finishing that rivals Swiss independents. Small production volume. Visits can be arranged through the brand directly. Highly recommended for luxury tour groups interested in Japanese craft precision. Yuzawa is accessible from Tokyo via Komachi Shinkansen (approx. 2 hours).

Malaysian-Swiss independent brand by photographer Ming Thein and partner Hendrik Müller. Design, engineering and final quality control in Kuala Lumpur; movement production in La Chaux-de-Fonds, Switzerland. One of the most respected independents globally. KL studio visits by arrangement.
Japanese microbrand focused on vintage-inspired divers and military-style watches with retro aesthetics.
Hong Kong-based microbrand specializing in affordable dive watches and sports models with quartz and automatic movements.
Chinese microbrand known for affordable mechanical watches, often vintage-inspired designs with accessible pricing.

Takehiko Kuroki is one of Japan's most respected independent watchmakers and an invited AHCI member. He produces entirely hand-finished mechanical watches from a small private Tokyo studio. No public website or confirmed atelier visit programme has been documented; contact would need to be made through specialist press or the AHCI. Verify before including in a tour itinerary.
South Korean independent brand known for affordable homage watches and original designs inspired by vintage military and dive watches. Uses Miyota and Seagull movements.
Japanese independent brand known for affordable dress and field watches with vintage aesthetic. Uses Seiko and Miyota movements.

Self-taught Chinese watchmaker who became an independent watchmaker in his 50s after an engineering career. AHCI member since 2015 (only the second Chinese member at the time). Known for unusual complications including a thermometer-style time display.
Hong Kong-based brand founded in 2017. Commissions Swiss-assembled movements. Headquarters in Ocean Centre, Harbour City, Kowloon.
